Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
24 
GDC_BLW_OOPT_AMT 
LABEL: 
Gross Drug Cost Below Part D Out-of-Pocket Threshold (GDCB) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the portion of the gross drug cost for the prescription drug fill that was not covered by 
Part D’s catastrophic coverage. 
Under Part D, a beneficiary qualifies for catastrophic coverage when his/her true out-of-pocket 
(TrOOP) costs reach
